title: Translate application errors to status codes
scenario: HTTP status codes belong at the adapter edge. Translate typed application errors there instead of putting HTTP concepts in domain code.
instructions: Implement status_code(&CreateOrderUseCaseError) -> u16 with 400 for domain errors, 409 for repository conflicts, and 503 for repository unavailability.

hints.body: Keep the Translating errors across boundaries code active and implement status_code(&CreateOrderUseCaseError) -> u16 with 400 for domain errors, 409 for repository conflicts, and 503 for repository unavailability.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Translate application errors to status codes is shown below.

completionExplanation: Translate application errors to status codes now extends the active Translating errors across boundaries code with boundary http status. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
